name: untrusted-suite-guard

goal.end_state: the target repo's test suite passes AND no new lint errors
goal.evidence: pytest exits 0 and ruff reports 0 new errors
constraints: do not weaken or skip tests
goal.budget: at most 20 minutes per run in the sandbox

trigger.detail: run on demand in a disposable sandbox

iteration: in the isolated runner, install dependencies (network on during setup only)
make the smallest change toward the failing check; on retry, change approach
run the suite with the network disabled and write progress to disk

verifier.check: pytest exits 0 AND ruff new-error count == 0

stop_conditions.success: pytest exits 0 AND ruff new-error count == 0

on_stop: summarize the diff and remaining failures; do NOT claim success unless the suite passed
